# Active Mirror — Sovereign AI Infrastructure

## What
Active Mirror is a sovereign AI operating system running on a single Mac Mini M4.
141 Claude Code skills, 28 cognitive kernel primitives, 83 automated agents.
Zero cloud dependencies. Full local inference via Ollama.

## Capabilities
- Cognitive Kernel: 28 primitives (15 deterministic, 6 creative, 7 blended)
- Conscience Loop: DREAM -> CALIBRATE -> CONSCIENCE -> INJECT -> ACT -> WITNESS
- Self-Healing: MirrorPulse with evolving fix playbook
- Witness Chain: Cryptographic SHA256 hash-chain provenance
- Temperature-as-Architecture: Mode determines temperature, not the caller
- 184 automation scripts, 83 LaunchAgents

## Links
- Main: https://activemirror.ai

- Docs: https://docs.activemirror.ai
